svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="前端技术栈总览" id="adbg-1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-484" dy="-163" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="560" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="HUB" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;" value="前端技术栈" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="370" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="核心框架
Vue3 + TypeScript" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="210" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="多端开发
Nuxt3 + Taro" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="210" x="345" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="服务端渲染
Node.js + Egg.js + Express" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="230" x="650" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="可视化
ECharts + d3 + threejs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="220" x="100" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="AI 辅助
Cursor + GitHub Copilot" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="220" x="600" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="T1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.25;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="HUB" value="核心框架"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" source="T2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="HUB" value="多端开发"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" edge="1" parent="1" source="T3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.25;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="HUB" value="服务端渲染"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E4" edge="1" parent="1" source="T4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.75;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="HUB" value="可视化"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E5" edge="1" parent="1" source="T5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.75;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="HUB" value="AI 辅助"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
